title: I built an AI tool that explains your technical indicators like a human — here’s how it works
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
Ever look at your RSI, MACD, and moving averages and wonder *what they’re really telling you*?

That’s what led to [AimyTrade.io]() — it takes your ticker and turns raw indicator data into a readable summary.  
  
No trading signals. No “buy/sell” hype. Just explanations, confidence levels, and context.

Example:  
When RSI diverges from MACD momentum, AimyTrade highlights it as a potential reversal setup — and shows the underlying reasoning, not just the number.

If anyone here uses similar tools or scripts, I’d love to compare outputs.  
What’s your current go-to method for interpreting indicators quickly?

comments.author: Effective-Plane-5100
comments.body: Show, I had thought of something, but I never got it off the ground

comments.author: Flashy-Distance4520
comments.body:
What you have looks good. What I built is more than just an indicator explanation tool, but a co-pilot for traders. It fetches real data, analyses them, then generates a trade idea.

It also has other awesome features to help traders be better in their trading journey. Check it out [FLOXON](https://www.floxon.ai).
